results.name: Oracle Corporation

ALGORITHM-BASED-WORKER-CLASSIFICATION candidate held NOT SCORABLE: reclassification claim is an unverified Blind post, Oracle silent, Strauss Borrelli WARN investigations closed without public resolution. Boundary case: 0.6pt above Critical.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: Carry-forward at 28.4. May 27 military-deployment law + 4 deaths already scored 2026-05-28; fifth-week strike is same event window. Reassess-on-resolution trigger not fired (crisis unresolved). No double-counting.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. HRW May 19 aid-curbs-and-civilian-deaths-during-ceasefire reinforces AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-WITH-SYSTEMATIC-DENIAL pattern (aid -37% Q1, 25 NGOs denied permits). Ceasefire is not an improvement signal.

results.name: Hungary
results.key_finding: Sulyok boundary-watch RESOLVED. Pre-committed INT +1.0 path fires (executive-restoration offset to supermajority-override concern); amendment framed as general framework + Venice Commission consulted. Composite 50.0->50.2. CONSTITUTIONAL-AMENDMENT-AS-EXECUTIVE-REMOVAL noted as methodology candidate.

results.name: Democratic Republic of C
results.key_finding: Near-floor confirm at 2.3. NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY ruling: Bundibugyo Ebola (282 confirmed, 42 deaths, PHEIC May 17) is an exogenous health shock revealing already-priced state incapacity, not a new state act. Disambiguation: composite-2.3 entity, not Republic of Congo.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Scale-floor ruling RE-AFFIRMED at 2.5. Partial internet restoration (May 25, ~40% traffic, WhatsApp restricted) is reactive, NOT an improvement signal. Single dominant extremity (execution rate) does not meet multi-category absolute-floor threshold.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. Famine confirmed (El Fasher, Kadugli); 33.7M need assistance; 825,000 under-5 severe acute malnutrition projected; 2026 plan 16.2% funded. Active-conflict siege/starvation dynamics; deepening trajectory.

results.name: Afghanistan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. GENDER-APARTHEID-FORMAL-RECOGNITION ruling (formalized 2026-05-29) re-affirmed. New criminal regulation + removal of equality before law + authorization of domestic violence = active state-perpetrated extremity. No new dated act beyond priced Jan-April 2026 evidence.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. Junta airstrikes on civilians + civilian infrastructure (982 airstrike deaths 2025, +53% YoY); record 3.6M displaced; jet-fuel ghost-ships (Iran-linked) document supply chain. Active state-perpetrated extremity; escalating trajectory.

results.name: Haiti
results.key_finding: Near-floor confirm at 4.7. Mixed signal nets neutral: drone-op civilian deaths (1,243; 17 children) vs incoming UN Gang Suppression Force build-out. Incoming/prospective capacity not yet creditable (credit requires demonstrated protective effect).

results.name: DeepMind/Google

FSF iteration incremental; union campaign in-progress; whistleblower allegation unverified — no substantive re-score.

results.name: Turkey
results.key_finding: Carry-forward at 10.3 (post-2026-05-29 downgrade and math-hygiene reconciliation). May 30 news (Erdogan 'designing his own opposition', snap-election speculation) is analysis/continuation, no new dated act.

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Carry-forward at 18.0. Mixed signal nets neutral: 621 released vs 500+ still held + 87 new detentions since Jan 3; amnesty bill lacks accountability mechanisms. Release-and-detain churn is not a creditable structural improvement. Recon 18.4 within rounding tolerance (no flag).

results.name: Amazon
results.key_finding: Documented hold at 12.8. NLRB JFK8 bargaining order (Apr 2) already in prior window; Amazon's federal-court challenge is continuation of litigation posture (priced into ACC 1.4). Union win is worker-power gain external to Amazon, not an Amazon compassion improvement. Recon 13.1 within rounding (no flag).

boundary_cases.outcome: carry-forward; any adverse reclassification adjudication would likely push into Critical

math_hygiene_flags.note: Genuine math-hygiene drift flagged by validate-indexes (>0.5pt, below 2.0 error gate). Working baseline = formula-correct 56.9 per Hungary-2026-05-18 / Turkey-2026-05-29 precedent. Change proposal reconciles stored->formula on apply; dimensions unchanged.

data_hygiene_flags.note: Scanner news_summary frames '1,500+ Bengali-Muslim expulsions May-June 2026' but the corroborating HRW source documents the May 7-June 15 2025 figure (prior-year cycle of the same recurring MHA detect/identify/deport regime). Treated as pattern continuation already priced into the 22.7 baseline; NO new dated act scored. A new, independently dated current-window mass-expulsion event would warrant EQU/ACC sub-threshold downgrade.
Disambiguation confirmed: composite-2.3 entity (rank 181, 'Democratic Republic of C'), NOT Republic of Congo. Ebola Bundibugyo evidence applied to the correct baseline.

methodology_rulings.ruling: PM using a two-thirds supermajority to remove a head of state installed by the prior regime via constitutional amendment. Scored as contested-net-positive when (a) pursued through the constitutional process, (b) framed as a general (non-person-specific) framework, and (c) subject to external review (Venice Commission). Pre-committed INT +1.0 (executive-restoration offset to concentration-of-power concern) fired. Logged as a methodology-novelty candidate; not yet operationalized into a standing rule.

An epidemic (Bundibugyo Ebola, no approved vaccine) is an exogenous health shock, not a state institutional act. It reveals already-priced state response incapacity rather than introducing a new scorable state act; no further downgrade on a near-floor baseline absent documented deliberate state obstruction. Distinct from the 0.0 active-state-perpetration floor.

NOT YET SCORABLE. WARN-avoidance-via-remote-reclassification candidate requires an adjudicated/corroborated finding. Current evidence is an unverified anonymous Blind post (Oracle silent) and Strauss Borrelli WARN investigations closed without public resolution. The terminations reaching effective date (May 30) are materialization of an already-priced event, not a new act. Held pending a court/regulator finding.

Re-affirmed. Held at floor-adjacent 2.5; single dominant extremity (execution rate) plus blackout-during-mass-arrests does not meet the multi-category extremity threshold for absolute 0.0. Partial/reactive internet restoration is not an improvement signal.
Re-affirmed (formalized 2026-05-29). Independent 0.0-floor-qualifying conduct category; no new dated act beyond priced Jan-April 2026 evidence.

Re-affirmed. Nominal aid authorization undercut by systematic operational denial (aid -37% Q1, 25 NGOs denied permits, civilian deaths during ceasefire). Ceasefire is not an improvement signal; floor reinforced at 0.0.

Logged as methodology-novelty candidate (DoD Gemini 'any lawful purpose' deal; OpenAI-DoD parallel). Not yet operationalized into a scoring rule; whistleblower allegation re: Israeli-drone-surveillance assistance is unverified single-source and does not meet the corroborated threshold to score.

Pre-committed INT +1.0 path fires; composite 50.0->50.2. New methodology candidate CONSTITUTIONAL-AMENDMENT-AS-EXECUTIVE-REMOVAL logged.

MATH-HYGIENE: stored composite 58.4 vs canonical-formula 56.9 (validate-indexes warning, diff 1.5). Change proposal reconciles to 56.9 with dimensions held. Substantive signals (FSF iteration, UK union campaign over military contracts, unverified Israeli-drone-surveillance whistleblower allegation, DoD Gemini deal) are incremental/in-progress/unverified — no substantive re-score.

NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY ruling on accelerating Bundibugyo Ebola (282 confirmed, 42 deaths, PHEIC May 17, no approved vaccine). Epidemic is an exogenous shock revealing already-priced near-floor state incapacity; no further downgrade absent documented deliberate state obstruction. Held at 2.3.

Venezuela (recon 18.4 vs 18.0), India (23.1 vs 22.7), Amazon (13.1 vs 12.8) reconstruction diffs are within rounding tolerance (<0.5pt) — NOT math-hygiene flags (per Open Bionics resolution; integration-premium 0 in all cases, diffs are pure rounding).
DRC disambiguation and India year-mismatch data-hygiene flags raised and resolved before scoring.
Bolivia, Turkey carry-forwards reconstruct exactly to stored values.
methodology_version_signal: v1.2 sustained. New/affirmed categories this cycle: CONSTITUTIONAL-AMENDMENT-AS-EXECUTIVE-REMOVAL (new candidate, INT-subthreshold), NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT (new ruling), MILITARY-AI-BY-CONTRACT-GOVERNANCE (candidate, not operationalized), ALGORITHM-BASED-WORKER-CLASSIFICATION (re-affirmed not-yet-scorable), SCALE-FLOOR-RULING (re-affirmed, Iran), GENDER-APARTHEID-FORMAL-RECOGNITION (re-affirmed, Afghanistan), AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-WITH-SYSTEMATIC-DENIAL (re-affirmed, Israel).
